components.name: AppLogo
components.description: Displays the application's brand logo, typically an SVG or image.

components.name: AuthPageBackground
components.description: Renders a background image or pattern specifically for authentication pages, positioned at the bottom.

components.name: LoginCardWrapper
components.description: A structural card component that serves as a container for the login form. It defines the layout for the header, content (form fields), and an optional footer. It internally leverages Shadcn's Card component for styling.

components.name: LoginForm
components.description: The core login form component, including input fields for email and password, and a submit button. It integrates with react-hook-form for state management and Zod for validation, using Shadcn UI atomic components like Input, Button, and Field.
